name: orc
description: Personal Claude Code marketplace for orc — the plan → debug → verify → ship workflow plugin.

plugins.name: orc
plugins.description: 55 curated skills (incl. workspace-mode for cross-repo flows), 19 composite slash commands, 10 specialist subagents, and 4 hook scripts that quietly enforce discipline (no commits to main, no AI-attribution trailers in commits/PRs, dependency pre-flight, skill catalog injected at every session start). Drives the senior-IC loop end-to-end via /orc:flow — workspace-aware: from a parent dir with multiple sibling repos, one flow spans them all with N linked PRs.
